description_long: This is a pair of rugged, dark-colored boots with a weathered, matte finish, likely made from leather or synthetic leather. The boots feature two prominent side buckles on each boot, adding both functional and decorative elements. The shafts are mid-calf height and appear slightly slouched, suggesting a flexible upper material. The toe boxes are rounded and reinforced, while the soles are thick and robust, suitable for urban environments. The boots lack visible laces, relying instead on the side buckles for adjustment and closure. The overall appearance suggests durability and comfort for everyday urban use.
description: A pair of dark, weathered mid-calf boots with side buckles and a matte, rugged finish. The boots are sturdy and designed for urban wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe boxes and the slightly slouched shafts of both boots.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the two metal buckles and straps on each boot, as well as the textured, robust soles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned backs of the boots and the height of the shafts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again showing the buckles and the overall worn texture of the boots.
